languages.text: "Не сомневаюсь". {n}По тону космодесантника трудно понять, серьезен ли он или насмехается над вами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Не сомневаюсь". {n}По тону космодесантника трудно понять, серьезен ли он или насмехается над вами.{/n}

languages.text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Не сомневаюсь". {n}По тону космодесантника трудно понять, серьезен ли он или насмехается над вами.{/n}

"I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}
"I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}

languages.text: “这点我毫不怀疑。”{n}从阿斯塔特的语气中，很难分辨他是在认真回应，还是在挖苦你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这点我毫不怀疑。”{n}从阿斯塔特的语气中，很难分辨他是在认真回应，还是在挖苦你。{/n}

languages.text: «No me cabe duda». {n}El tono del Astartes no te permite saber si habla en serio o se burla de ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No me cabe duda». {n}El tono del Astartes no te permite saber si habla en serio o se burla de ti.{/n}

languages.text: « Je n'en doute pas. » {n}Le ton du guerrier de l'Astartes ne vous permet pas de trancher : est-il sérieux ou se moque-t-il de vous ?{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je n'en doute pas. » {n}Le ton du guerrier de l'Astartes ne vous permet pas de trancher : est-il sérieux ou se moque-t-il de vous ?{/n}

languages.text: "Bundan şüphem yok." {n}Astartes'in ses tonundan ciddi mi olduğu yoksa seninle alay mı ettiği anlaşılmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bundan şüphem yok." {n}Astartes'in ses tonundan ciddi mi olduğu yoksa seninle alay mı ettiği anlaşılmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Das bezweifle ich nicht." {n}Es ist schwer, am Ton des Astartes zu erkennen, ob er es ernst meint oder dich verspottet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das bezweifle ich nicht." {n}Es ist schwer, am Ton des Astartes zu erkennen, ob er es ernst meint oder dich verspottet.{/n}

languages.text: 「疑う余地はない」{n}アスタレスの口調から、彼が真面目な顔で話しているのか、それとも皮肉を言っているのかは判断できない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}
